6 ?70 1101110001 6

6 C 6 1111111111 a mismatch

6 I 7 0110111011 7 mismatch

6 1101110001 6

left 5

6 I 0

Selected
0 I 1
1 I 2
2 I 3

4 I 5
5 I 6
6 XOR 70
7 I 1

Applying to 01011001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 1 = 1
1 I 2 = 0
2 I 3 = 1
3 I 4 = 1
4 I 5 = 0
5 I 6 = 0
6 XOR 70 = XOR(I 7,I 0) = XOR(1,0) = 1
7 I 1 = 1

\boxed{10110011}
